trades.sentiment_summary: Omnicom completed a $2.95 billion exchange offer for Interpublic Group notes on January 14, 2026, following the merger closure on November 26, 2025, with most IPG notes exchanged and retired. This transaction supports the integration of IPG as a wholly owned subsidiary of Omnicom, creating a leading global marketing entity. A predicted fair opening price of $24.57 for IPG stock aligns with current levels around $24.57-$24.63.[5][4][1]
